description_long: This is a green, box-shaped utility trailer mounted on a black metal frame with two wheels and a prominent towing arm. The main body appears to be an enclosed generator or equipment housing, featuring ventilation grilles, a digital display, and control panels on the front. The trailer is equipped with a single axle and two robust tires, suitable for towing behind a vehicle. The frame includes a triangular support structure at the front, ending in a standard hitch for attachment. Branding and signage are visible on the side, along with access panels and warning labels. The exterior is mostly metal, with no visible windows and a utilitarian, industrial design.
description: A green, boxy utility trailer with two wheels, a black metal frame, and a front control panel, designed for towing and housing equipment.
description_view_0: Front view showing the control panel, digital display, ventilation grilles, and part of the black frame.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid green box, single wheel, and the full length of the black frame and towing arm.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain green back of the trailer and the triangular support structure of the hitch.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the green box, wheel, side access panels, branding, and warning labels.
attribute_branding_or_signage: yellow and white logo with text on side
